This direct integration helps to make informed decisions & take positive actions based on sustainability targets resulting in higher efficiency and more sustainable value chains.

Risk Scores in SAP Ariba SLP Supplier 360

AI & Sustainability

Sustainability & Profitability go hand in hand, and AI can play a crucial role in embedding them together. SAP aims at using SAP Business AI to help customers optimize for sustainable impact across their full value chain, enabling the intelligent, sustainable enterprise, powered by the pool of foundational business data. AI can help deciding on data-driven ESG and net-zero goals, strategies, and actions. It can also help complying with regulations and automate sustainability reporting. Few use cases already exist and others can be built using SAP BTP. Kindly refer below resources for more details.

  • The power of sustainability, ERP, and AI - This 6 minute video explains how integrating sustainability into ERP business processes, combined with the power of SAP Business AI, can help an organization’s business decision-making to the next level and meet environmental, social, and governance compliance requirements.
  • Building AI and Sustainability Solutions on SAP BTP - This SAP Learning (learning.sap.com) Course helps building skills to infuse AI in Sustainability solutions. Its around 10 Hours in duration and is free for all.
  • Putting Sustainability at the Heart of ERP - SAP recently announced 2 new AI-driven sustainability use cases - Emission Factor Mapping with AI & ESG Report Generation with AI. This article has more details.

 

Conclusion

In today's world, sustainability is no longer an option but a necessity for organizations aiming to thrive and remain competitive. SAP Ariba provides a platform to help businesses achieve business goals while integrating sustainability into their procurement and supply chain operations. It helps businesses to make informed decisions that positively impact the environment while driving economic value.

By adopting SAP Ariba, digital transformation and sustainability can go hand-in-hand. Organizations can contribute to a more sustainable world and create long-term value for all stakeholders. In summary, embracing sustainability with SAP Ariba is not just about compliance and efficiency, it's about redefining business success in the context of our global responsibility. By embedding sustainable practices into core operations, businesses can pave the way for a more sustainable and prosperous future for all. It can help the world run better and improve people's lives with sustainability at the core.

 

Consolidated List of Resources

  • SAP's Sustainability solutions
  • UN defined sustainability goals
  • Green Ledger Overview video
  • SAP Sustainability Footprint Management (SFM) Overview video
  • SAP Sustainability Control Tower (SCT) Overview video
  • SAP Sustainability Data Exchange (SDX) Overview video
  • Sustainability in Procurement Processes video
  • Sustainable Supplier Finance
  • Solution Extension - Sustainability for SAP Ariba
  • EcoVadis Business Sustainability Assessments, ESG Ratings and Carbon Scorecards
  • EcoVadis Business Sustainability Ratings for SAP Ariba
  • The power of sustainability, ERP, and AI video
  • Training Course - Building AI and Sustainability Solutions on SAP BTP
  • Article - Putting Sustainability at the Heart of ERP

 

Note: Kindly refer 'Comments' for updates to the Blog Post. Also requesting readers to enter Comments with info which can be helpful to all.

entry.title: Enhanced Continuous Quality Check for SAP Ariba and SAP Business Network Now Available
entry.content:
“Continuous quality checks” are individual services delivered by SAP Enterprise Support and are available with every cloud subscription. The remote-service reports help you reduce technical risks and identify areas for optimization potential, based on real-life data from your systems or solution.

The revamped Continuous Quality Check (CQC) for deployment readiness for SAP Ariba and SAP Business Network is now available. This CQC is designed to provide an SAP best practice review for key settings in your SAP Ariba and SAP Business Network instance.

View the CQC info sheet for full details.

Solutions Covered by This Service

  • SAP Ariba Sourcing
  • SAP Ariba Contracts
  • SAP Ariba Supplier Lifecycle and Performance
  • SAP Ariba Supplier Risk NEW
  • SAP Ariba Buying
  • SAP Ariba Buying and Invoicing
  • SAP Ariba Catalog
  • SAP Ariba Invoice Management
  • SAP Business Network for Procurement
  • SAP Business Network Commerce Automation NEW
  • SAP Business Network Supply Chain Collaboration NEW
  • SAP Integration Suite, managed gateway for spend management and SAP Business Network NEW

Key Benefits

  • Review current settings, use of features, and enablement of key functions.
  • Identify concerns, issues and potential risks prior to deployment/go-live.
  • Receive a detailed service report that highlights key areas for consideration and SAP best practice recommendations.
  • Optimize the possibility for a smooth start of production.

When to Use

  • Before the go-live of a new SAP Ariba implementation.
  • When additional solutions are added to the existing SAP Ariba suite.
  • As a "health check" for productive SAP Ariba and SAP Business Network systems.

How to Request

  • Remote Services can be requested via the new Get Support application in SAP for Me (SAP Note 1296527). When submitting your request, please select:
  1. Product: “Continuous Quality Check & Improvement Services”
  2. Product function: “Service request for a Cloud Solution”
  • If you need assistance in submitting your case, you may contact your local Customer Interaction Center (CIC).
  • SAP recommends service booking of six (6) weeks prior to go-live date, to allow for the delivery four (4) weeks before your go-live date and provide adequate time to review and implement any SAP recommendations (attempts will be made to accommodate requests made outside this timeframe, but are not guaranteed).
  • SAP will evaluate if this service is suitable for your business needs.
  • SAP recommends the service to be performed on the productive tenant, if not available it can be performed on the test tenant.

Achieve More with SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps

Find the right content to accelerate the value of your solution with the Spend Management and Business Network value map from SAP Enterprise Support. Included with every SAP cloud subscription, value maps offer structured, product-level Learning Rooms where you can navigate to curated content, be directed to self-service platforms, engage with fellow customers and SAP experts, and discover continuous quality checks to mitigate implementation risks or identify optimization potential.

Explore how SAP technology can transform your procurement operation or make your existing software work harder for you by visiting value maps today.

Access Value Maps in 3 Easy Steps:   

  1. One-time sign-up for SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support, is required   
  2. Access value maps 
  3. Navigate to the SAP Enterprise Support value map for Spend Management and Business Network 

Once in the value map, we welcome you to collaborate in our forums, ask questions or “Request a Call” to speak with one of our experts for further help. Value maps are easy to navigate but an on-boarding call allows us to tailor the conversation to suit your needs and highlight specific content for you. 

Got a question about value maps, or our content?

📺Watch our short video.

Leverage the “ask questions” feature in the value map or email us:
sapesvaluemaps@sap.com
